description: Curated registry of proven AI agent design skills. Skills are vetted for quality, freshness, and compatibility.

skills.name: Design Principles
skills.description: Visual design fundamentals: 60-30-10 color rule, 8px grid, semantic tokens, WCAG contrast, visual hierarchy, interaction states

skills.name: Animation & Motion
skills.description: Motion design: timing/easing presets, stagger orchestration, trigger types, micro-interactions, reduced-motion accessibility, GPU-composited performance

skills.name: Typography Expertise
skills.description: Typography: font selection, type scale (1.25 ratio), readability, vertical rhythm, fluid type with clamp(), web best practices

skills.name: Transitions & Effects
skills.description: CSS transitions and visual effects: page transitions, hover/focus effects, glassmorphism, shadows, loading states, reduced motion alternatives

skills.name: UI/UX Pro Max
skills.description: Comprehensive UI/UX design intelligence: 50+ visual styles, 161 color palettes, 57 font pairings, 161 product types, 99 UX guidelines, 25 chart types. Covers React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, SwiftUI, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui

skills.name: Epic Design
skills.description: Cinematic 2.5D interactive websites: scroll storytelling, parallax depth, text animations, section overlaps, clip-path reveals, curtain drops, iris opens, card stacks, bleed typography — 45+ techniques across 8 categories

skills.name: Frontend Patterns
skills.description: React/Next.js frontend architecture: state management patterns, performance optimization, rendering strategies (SSR/SSG/ISR), component composition, code splitting

skills.name: Accessibility Audit
skills.description: WCAG 2.2 Level A and AA compliance: scan, fix, and verify accessibility across React, Next.js, Vue, Angular, Svelte, and plain HTML. Color contrast, ARIA, keyboard navigation, screen reader support

skills.name: Brand Guidelines
skills.description: Brand identity enforcement: color systems, typography, logo usage, brand voice, tone matrix, visual identity consistency across all outputs

skills.name: shadcn/ui Styling
skills.description: Beautiful accessible UIs with shadcn/ui (Radix UI + Tailwind): dialogs, dropdowns, forms, tables, dark mode, theme customization, responsive layouts

skills.name: Design System Tokens
skills.description: Token architecture: primitive→semantic→component three-layer tokens, CSS variables, spacing/typography scales, component specifications

skills.name: Landing Page Generator
skills.description: High-converting landing pages: hero sections, feature grids, pricing tables, FAQ accordions, testimonial blocks, CTA sections. Uses PAS/AIDA/BAB copy frameworks, SEO meta tags, structured data

skills.name: Coding Standards
skills.description: Universal coding standards for TypeScript, JavaScript, React, Node.js: naming conventions, file structure, error handling, async patterns, testing conventions

skills.name: GSAP Animation
skills.description: GSAP animation library: core gsap.to/from/fromTo/timeline, ScrollTrigger for scroll-driven animations, MotionPath/DrawSVG/MorphSVG plugins, Flip/Text/ScrollTo utilities, performance best practices

skills.name: Impeccable Design
skills.description: Comprehensive design skill: visual hierarchy, spacing systems, semantic color palettes, typography scales, interaction design, accessibility first, performance as feature, anti-pattern catalog

skills.name: Hallmark Design
skills.description: Anti-AI-slop design quality gate: 22 design themes, 65 slop-test gates, 4 core verbs (default/audit/redesign/study), rating scale from Hallmark to redesign

skills.name: Sonner Toast
skills.description: Sonner toast notification component: installation, Toaster props, toast() API variants (success/error/promise/custom), dismiss patterns, action buttons, best practices for async feedback

skills.name: Vaul Drawer
skills.description: Vaul drawer component for React: Drawer.Root/Content/Overlay/Handle API, snap points, drag-to-dismiss, direction control, nested drawers, accessibility, mobile bottom sheets

skills.name: Anthropic Frontend Design
skills.description: Production-grade frontend UI design by Anthropic: bold intentional layouts, component state management (8 states), accessibility-first (WCAG 2.2 AA), dark mode by default, responsive patterns

skills.name: Anthropic Brand Guidelines
skills.description: Anthropic brand identity system: brand colors (#D4A574 primary), Poppins/Lora typography, full neutral scale, type scale, usage rules, dark mode variants, WCAG AA compliance

skills.name: Canvas Design
skills.description: Canvas-based visual art creation: abstract/surreal/minimalist styles, philosophical visualization, data storytelling, diagram generation, PNG/PDF export at 72-300 DPI with retina support

skills.name: Webapp Testing
skills.description: Playwright-based web app testing: Page Object Model pattern, resilient selectors (getByRole/getByLabel/getByTestId), auth setup, fixtures, visual regression, accessibility testing with axe

skills.name: Web Frontend Design (skillsdirectory)
skills.description: Community-sourced frontend design skill (Grade A, 345 stars): visual design, component architecture, accessibility WCAG 2.2 AA, performance optimization, responsive patterns

skills.name: Design Principles (Nokonoko1203)
skills.description: Minimal design system inspired by Linear/Notion/Stripe: content-first, function over form, systematized consistency, 8px spacing scale, Inter typography, 12-column grid, accessible by default

skills.name: Frontend Design (LukeRenton)
skills.description: Production-grade frontend design skill (229 stars): visual clarity and hierarchy principles, complete component state management, responsive mobile-first CSS, interaction design patterns

skills.name: Build Dashboard
skills.description: Interactive HTML dashboard builder: bar/line/pie/area/scatter charts, date/select/slider filters, grid/tabs/sidebar layouts, responsive standalone HTML export with real-time interactivity

skills.name: React Best Practices
skills.description: 70 production-grade React/Next.js rules: component architecture (10), state management (10), performance (10), data fetching (10), styling (8), accessibility (8), TypeScript (7), App Router (7)

skills.name: Emil Kowalski Design Engineering
skills.description: UI polish, component design, animation decisions, and invisible details that make software feel great. Emil Kowalski's philosophy on design engineering, component architecture, and pixel-perfect execution

skills.name: CSS Animation Patterns
skills.description: CSS transitions, keyframes, scroll-driven animations, @property, GPU-accelerated properties, accessibility with prefers-reduced-motion. Pure CSS animation techniques without JavaScript libraries

skills.name: Frontend Slides
skills.description: Zero-dependency animation-rich HTML presentations from scratch or PowerPoint conversion. Build stunning scrollable slide decks that run entirely in the browser

skills.name: Motion Animation Library
skills.description: React animations with Motion (Framer Motion): declarative animations, drag gestures, scroll effects, spring physics, layout animations, SVG morphing. Bundle optimization with LazyMotion (4.6 KB) or useAnimate mini (2.3 KB)

skills.name: Three.js 3D Graphics
skills.description: 3D scenes and interactive experiences with Three.js: geometry building, materials, lighting, raycasting, particles, camera controls, shadows, textures. CDN-compatible r128 patterns plus production build practices

skills.name: Scroll Experience
skills.description: Immersive scroll-driven experiences: parallax storytelling, scroll animations, interactive narratives, cinematic web experiences. GSAP ScrollTrigger, Framer Motion scroll, CSS scroll-timeline, sticky sections, horizontal scroll
